# In Parallel

> The AI note-taker that writes your plan. In Parallel joins your meetings, captures every decision and commitment, and turns them into a living execution plan — automatically. Start free.

Website: https://www.in-parallel.com
Contact: hello@in-parallel.com

---

## Product Overview

In Parallel is a coordination layer that starts with a free AI note-taker and grows into a living execution plan. It joins your meetings, captures decisions, commitments, ownership changes, and risks — then updates your plan and connected tools automatically. No manual updates. No chasing. Just a shared picture of what's actually happening.

Save 6-8 hours per manager, every week. Achieve 100% alignment across teams. Make cross-team decisions 2x faster.

### The Three-Layer Product

**Layer 1: AI Note-Taker (Free)**
The foundation. Joins meetings silently on Zoom, Teams, and Google Meet. Transcribes with speaker attribution. Delivers instant, structured summaries. Extracts decisions, risks, commitments, and ownership. Zero friction — no behavior change required. Free forever, no credit card needed.

**Layer 2: Living Plan (From €69/scope/month)**
Turns captured meeting signals into a continuously updated execution plan. Auto-updates priorities from meeting signals. Recalculates priority scores in real time. Detects drift — divergence between plan and reality. Flags stalled commitments automatically. Integrates bi-directionally with PM, CRM, and OKR tools. Sends Slack and Teams notifications.

**Layer 3: Execution Intelligence (Coming Soon)**
Five intelligence modules that turn accumulated meeting context into predictive execution intelligence:
- MCP Context Platform — APIs for AI agents to access execution context
- Stakeholder Communication Intelligence — auto-generated, audience-tailored reports
- Meeting Intelligence — real-time context surfacing, conflict detection, agenda generation
- Continuous Intelligence — decision velocity, commitment follow-through, risk resolution metrics
- Risk & Compliance Intelligence — regulatory flags, audit trails, compliance tracking

---

## How It Works

In Parallel works across the full meeting lifecycle:

**Weekly Brief**
Start every week with a clear picture. What changed since last week, what's at risk, where you stand against the plan — delivered before your first meeting.

**Pre-Meeting Preparation**
Walk in prepared. See what was decided last time, what's unresolved, and what needs a decision today — automatically compiled from previous meetings.

**During the Meeting (Free)**
No one takes notes. In Parallel joins silently and captures every decision, action item, ownership assignment, and commitment as it happens. Speaker-attributed transcription with live extraction.

**After the Meeting**
The moment the meeting ends, structured summaries go out, connected tools update, and the plan adjusts. Tasks pushed to Jira, Linear, Asana. Nothing for you to do.

**Continuous (Living Plan Add-on)**
Between meetings, priorities recalculate. Drift gets flagged. Forgotten commitments surface. The plan stays alive without anyone maintaining it.

---

## The Coordination Layer

In Parallel is built on a fundamental insight: meetings are the most consequential data system in every organization, and none of that information flows anywhere structured.

The coordination tax — the invisible work of chasing updates, reconciling versions, and re-explaining decisions — consumes nearly half of every manager's week. 71% of senior managers say meetings are unproductive (HBR, 2017). 58% of the workday goes to "work about work" (Asana, 2022).

The fix isn't another project management tool. It's a coordination layer — infrastructure that sits underneath existing tools and meetings, keeps the shared picture of reality current automatically, and gets smarter with every meeting that flows through it.

A coordination layer is listen-first (not write-first like PM tools), maintains continuous state (not point-in-time), draws from multiple sources (meetings + tools + communications), and accumulates institutional memory that persists beyond any individual's tenure.

---

## Integrations

In Parallel works with whatever your teams are already using. No migrations. No new process. Just connection.

- Microsoft 365 Copilot — Connect all your work items on Microsoft 365
- Microsoft Teams — Transcribe your calls and chats
- Microsoft SharePoint — Attach files to tasks to keep teams connected
- Microsoft PowerBI — Access your existing business intelligence
- Microsoft Outlook — Sync task and project deadlines to your calendar
- Microsoft Project — Connect your project management workflows
- Slack — Get updates, create and delegate tasks without leaving Slack
- Google Workspace — Connect all your work items on Google Workspace
- Google Calendar — Sync task and project deadlines to your work calendar
- Google Meet — Transcribe your calls and chats
- Linear — Connect your modern software development system
- Atlassian Jira — Connect your development and project tracking
- HubSpot — Connect your CRM and marketing intelligence
- Salesforce — Connect your CRM and marketing intelligence
- Asana — Connect your project management workflows

---

## Pricing

**Free — AI Note-Taker**
€0 per month, forever. No credit card required.
- Meeting transcription with speaker attribution
- Structured summaries
- Decision and commitment extraction
- Unlimited meetings

**Living Plan (Recommended)**
From €69 per scope, per month (billed annually).
- Everything in Free
- Auto-updating execution plan
- Priority recalculation
- Drift detection
- Bi-directional tool integrations
- Slack and Teams notifications

**Enterprise**
Custom pricing. Coming soon.
- Everything in Living Plan
- MCP Context Platform — APIs for AI agents
- Stakeholder communication intelligence
- Decision velocity and follow-through metrics
- Risk and compliance intelligence
- Dedicated support and SLA

Volume discounts available for 500+ scopes. All prices in EUR, excluding VAT. Payment term: 30 days from invoice. Typical payback: less than 1 week. Target ROI: approximately 10x vs monthly scope cost.

Book a demo: https://www.in-parallel.com/demo
Start free: https://www.in-parallel.com/waitlist

---

## Security & Compliance

Enterprise-ready out of the box. EU-hosted — data never leaves European borders without consent. No AI models are trained on customer data.

### Certifications & Standards

- ISO 27001 — Information security management certified
- ISO 42001 — AI management system certified
- SOC 2 Type II — Audited and attested security controls
- GDPR Compliant — Full compliance with EU data protection regulations

### Enterprise Security Features

- SSO/SAML/SCIM authentication
- Role-based access control (RBAC)
- Full audit logs
- EU data residency
- DPIA documentation included as standard

---

## Company

Founded in 2023, In Parallel is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland with an office in Munich, Germany.

**Mission**: Empower organizations and individuals to do the right things right — every week, not just every quarter.

**Vision**: AI amplifies the human contribution when we rethink the work around it. Management becomes less overhead so leaders can focus on purpose, principles, priorities, promises, and people.

**Investors**: Lifeline Ventures, Notion Capital, and a group of private investors.

### Leadership Team

- Markku Mäkeläinen — Co-founder & CEO. Founder of data pricing startup (high-value exit). Led Facebook's International Partnerships (Internet.org at scale). Scaled music-oriented Fintech to €550M GTV in 18 months.
- Kristian Luoma — Co-founder, Product. 20 awards for new business initiatives at OP Financial Group. Built 60+ products with up to 300M active users. Acquired and integrated 15 companies.
- Michal Olczak — Chief Technology Officer. Deep finance and enterprise sector experience. Led teams at OP Financial Group and Nokia.
- Jari Heinonen — Head of Sales. 25+ years B2B SaaS sales. Mid-market, enterprise, and telecom expertise.
- Sami Niemelä — Head of Design. Partner and co-founder at Nordkapp. 40 awards. Contributor to Oura, Supermetrics, Beddit, Umbra 3D.
- Topi Järvinen — Head of Customer Success. Ex-PwC innovation leader. Launched 100+ products.

### Offices

- Helsinki HQ: Salomonkatu 17 B 4. Krs, 00100 Helsinki, Finland
- Munich: Freddie-Mercury-Straße 5, 80797 München, Germany

### Careers

Building the next generation of enterprise software from Helsinki. If you're excited about AI, execution intelligence, and enterprise-scale challenges, reach out at careers@in-parallel.com.

---

## Use Cases

In Parallel serves teams across roles and functions:

- **COO / Operations Leader** — Eliminate "work about work" and get 6-8 hours back per manager per week
- **Program Manager** — Auto-updated plans, drift detection, and cross-scope visibility
- **Project Manager** — Plans that maintain themselves from meeting conversations
- **Engineering Leader** — Decisions propagate to Linear and Jira automatically
- **Team Lead** — Weekly briefs, commitment tracking, and priority alignment
- **Account Executive / Sales Leader** — Customer-facing insights connected to CRM
- **Strategy / PMO** — Portfolio-level coordination intelligence

---

## Comparisons

In Parallel compared to alternatives:

- **vs Fellow** — Fellow captures meeting notes. In Parallel turns them into a living execution plan.
- **vs Fireflies.ai** — Fireflies transcribes. In Parallel builds coordination intelligence from transcriptions.
- **vs Spinach** — Spinach automates sprint ceremonies. In Parallel coordinates across the entire organization.
- **vs Atlassian** — Atlassian provides building blocks. In Parallel is the intelligence layer that connects them.
- **vs ClickUp** — ClickUp is project management with AI features. In Parallel is execution intelligence that makes any PM tool smarter.
- **vs WorkBoard** — WorkBoard aligns top-down. In Parallel builds execution intelligence bottom-up from meetings.
- **vs Read.ai** — Read.ai searches knowledge. In Parallel drives coordination and execution.
